creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Gmelin from comment #2)
arc patch D43083

Trying to apply on a ports tree in 'main' branch.

I don't get what pkg has to do with this... can you elaborate?

Deinstalling php80 related stuff (only have them because of arcanist)

$ sudo pkg delete -x 'php.*'
Password:
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
Deinstallation has been requested for the following 8 packages (of 0 packages in the universe):

Installed packages to be REMOVED:
        arcanist-lib-php80: 20220518_5
        arcanist-php80: 20220518_5
        php80: 8.0.30
        php80-curl: 8.0.30
        php80-dom: 8.0.30
        php80-mbstring: 8.0.30
        php80-simplexml: 8.0.30
        php80-zlib: 8.0.30

Number of packages to be removed: 8

The operation will free 38 MiB.

Proceed with deinstalling packages? [y/N]: y
[1/8] Deinstalling arcanist-php80-20220518_5...
[1/8] Deleting files for arcanist-php80-20220518_5: 100%
[2/8] Deinstalling arcanist-lib-php80-20220518_5...
[2/8] Deleting files for arcanist-lib-php80-20220518_5: 100%
[3/8] Deinstalling php80-dom-8.0.30...
[3/8] Deleting files for php80-dom-8.0.30: 100%
[4/8] Deinstalling php80-zlib-8.0.30...
[4/8] Deleting files for php80-zlib-8.0.30: 100%
[5/8] Deinstalling php80-simplexml-8.0.30...
[5/8] Deleting files for php80-simplexml-8.0.30: 100%
[6/8] Deinstalling php80-mbstring-8.0.30...
[6/8] Deleting files for php80-mbstring-8.0.30: 100%
[7/8] Deinstalling php80-curl-8.0.30...
[7/8] Deleting files for php80-curl-8.0.30: 100%
[8/8] Deinstalling php80-8.0.30...
[8/8] Deleting files for php80-8.0.30: 100%

Install arcanist-php81

$ sudo pkg install arcanist-php81

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        arcanist-lib-php81: 20220518_5
        arcanist-php81: 20220518_5
        php81: 8.1.26
        php81-curl: 8.1.26
        php81-dom: 8.1.26
        php81-mbstring: 8.1.26
        php81-simplexml: 8.1.26
        php81-zlib: 8.1.26

Number of packages to be installed: 8

The process will require 39 MiB more space.
7 MiB to be downloaded.


....

$ arc patch D43083
Created and checked out branch arcpatch-D43083.
Checking patch textproc/bsd-spell/Makefile...
Applied patch textproc/bsd-spell/Makefile cleanly.
 COMMITTED  Successfully committed patch.

That did the trick, thanks.
